creator: sergey.dyatko@gmail.com
text:
Hi, 
fixed. 

buildlog:
http://tiger.ipfw.ru/files/q4wine-0.118.log

diff -Nura /usr/ports/deskutils/q4wine/Makefile ./Makefile
--- /usr/ports/deskutils/q4wine/Makefile	2010-04-06
09:27:07.000000000 +0300 +++ ./Makefile	2010-05-18
10:32:16.000000000 +0300 @@ -2,22 +2,22 @@
 # Date created:		05 Feb 2009
 # Whom:			Sergey V. Dyatko
<sergey.dyatko@gmail.com> #
-# $FreeBSD: ports/deskutils/q4wine/Makefile,v 1.7 2010/03/28 06:32:47
dinoex Exp $ +# $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	q4wine
-DISTVERSION=	0.112-r1
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	0.118
 CATEGORIES=	deskutils emulators
-MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}-0.112-r1
+MASTER_SITES=
SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}%20${PORTVERSION} 
 MAINTAINER=	sergey.dyatko@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	QT4 front-end for WINE
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	sudo:${PORTSDIR}/security/sudo \
-		icotool:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/icoutils \
 		wine:${PORTSDIR}/emulators/wine \
 		wget:${PORTSDIR}/ftp/wget \
-		cabextract:${PORTSDIR}/archivers/cabextract
+		cabextract:${PORTSDIR}/archivers/cabextract \
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	icotool:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/icoutils 
 
 USE_QT_VER=	4
 QT_COMPONENTS=	qmake_build rcc_build moc_build uic_build \
@@ -26,10 +26,12 @@
 ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=	i386
 ONLY_FOR_ARCHS_REASON=	depends on wine which is only available
for i386 
+MAN1=		q4wine-cli.1 q4wine-helper.1 q4wine.1
+
 USE_CMAKE=	yes
 CMAKE_USE_PTHREAD=	yes
 
 post-install:
-	-update-desktop-database
+	@-update-desktop-database
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
diff -Nura /usr/ports/deskutils/q4wine/distinfo ./distinfo
--- /usr/ports/deskutils/q4wine/distinfo	2010-03-14
20:57:58.000000000 +0200 +++ ./distinfo	2010-05-06
10:38:06.000000000 +0300 @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (q4wine-0.112-r1.tar.gz) = 162d4cf15609775591c8f4f7c9759551
-SHA256 (q4wine-0.112-r1.tar.gz) =
45dea0a0b390359f835e823db5d3643d497246fb86ba2ff48b594b3d483131db -SIZE
(q4wine-0.112-r1.tar.gz) = 517720 +MD5 (q4wine-0.118.tar.gz) =
314a5eaaa2cce0bd4f3141baf94c82eb +SHA256 (q4wine-0.118.tar.gz) =
f27cb42c15edf0aee8d1df929710e62d00ad016bbc686f7552c0c2d033e4e8b4 +SIZE
(q4wine-0.118.tar.gz) = 750016 diff
-Nura /usr/ports/deskutils/q4wine/files/patch-src-man1-CMakeLists.txt ./files/patch-src-man1-CMakeLists.txt
--- /usr/ports/deskutils/q4wine/files/patch-src-man1-CMakeLists.txt
1970-01-01 03:00:00.000000000 +0300
+++ ./files/patch-src-man1-CMakeLists.txt	2010-05-18
11:36:29.000000000 +0300 @@ -0,0 +1,20 @@ +---
src/man1/CMakeLists.txt.old  2010-04-15 13:33:29.000000000 +0300 ++++
src/man1/CMakeLists.txt      2010-05-18 10:52:31.000000000 +0300 +@@
-40,7 +40,7 @@
+     endforeach()
+ 
+     install(DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/man1 DESTINATION
+-    ${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}/share/man FILES_MATCHING PATTERN
"*.1.${ARC_SUFF}" ++    ${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}/man FILES_MATCHING
PATTERN "*.1.${ARC_SUFF}"
+     PATTERN "CMakeFiles" EXCLUDE)
+ 
+  ELSE (ARC)
+@@ -48,6 +48,6 @@
+     MESSAGE(STATUS "Installing not compressed man pages --\n")
+ 
+     install(DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/man1 DESTINATION
+-    ${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}/share/man FILES_MATCHING PATTERN "*.1"
++    ${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}/man FILES_MATCHING PATTERN "*.1"
+     PATTERN "CMakeFiles" EXCLUDE)
+  ENDIF (ARC)
+
diff -Nura /usr/ports/deskutils/q4wine/pkg-message ./pkg-message
--- /usr/ports/deskutils/q4wine/pkg-message	2010-03-14
20:57:58.000000000 +0200 +++ ./pkg-message	2009-10-30
00:51:30.000000000 +0200 @@ -11,4 +11,6 @@
 
 mount /proc
 
+Also you need sudo for mdconfig, mount_cd9660, umount commands
+
 ################################################################################
diff -Nura /usr/ports/deskutils/q4wine/pkg-plist ./pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/deskutils/q4wine/pkg-plist	2010-03-14
20:57:58.000000000 +0200 +++ ./pkg-plist	2010-05-06
10:54:07.000000000 +0300 @@ -1,7 +1,25 @@
 bin/q4wine
+bin/q4wine-cli
+bin/q4wine-helper
+lib/q4wine/libq4wine-core.so
+share/applications/q4wine.desktop
+share/pixmaps/q4wine.png
 %%DATADIR%%/i18n/en_us.qm
+%%DATADIR%%/i18n/es_es.qm
+%%DATADIR%%/i18n/it_it.qm
+%%DATADIR%%/i18n/pt_br.qm
 %%DATADIR%%/i18n/ru_ru.qm
 %%DATADIR%%/i18n/uk_ua.qm
+%%DATADIR%%/icons/eject.png
+%%DATADIR%%/icons/exec_wine.png
+%%DATADIR%%/icons/explorer.png
+%%DATADIR%%/icons/notepad.png
+%%DATADIR%%/icons/regedit.png
+%%DATADIR%%/icons/uninstaller.png
+%%DATADIR%%/icons/winecfg.png
+%%DATADIR%%/icons/wineconsole.png
+%%DATADIR%%/scripts/mount_image.sh
+%%DATADIR%%/scripts/umount.sh
 %%DATADIR%%/theme/nuvola/data/configure.png
 %%DATADIR%%/theme/nuvola/data/down.png
 %%DATADIR%%/theme/nuvola/data/edit.png
@@ -16,15 +34,16 @@
 %%DATADIR%%/theme/nuvola/data/rebuild.png
 %%DATADIR%%/theme/nuvola/data/reload.png
 %%DATADIR%%/theme/nuvola/data/stop.png
-%%DATADIR%%/theme/nuvola/data/theme.info
 %%DATADIR%%/theme/nuvola/data/up.png
 %%DATADIR%%/theme/nuvola/data/wine.png
 %%DATADIR%%/theme/nuvola/data/wizard.png
-share/applications/q4wine.desktop
-share/pixmaps/q4wine.png
-@dirrmtry share/applications
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/theme/nuvola/data
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/theme/nuvola
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/theme
+@dirrm %%DATADIR%%/scripts
+@dirrm %%DATADIR%%/icons
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/i18n
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%
+@dirrm share/man
+@dirrmtry share/applications
+@dirrm lib/q4wine


--
wbr. tiger
